reviews.review_text:
Lovely well kept campsite with all the basics. Lots of wild rabbits to watch through the day/evening.
Toilets, laundry facilities, showers and dishwashing facilities.
Reception was manned at the time we arrived and the warden was very friendly and had a speedy check in.

Something to note:

Shower facilities are not separate men/women showers. It is one shower block with individual lockable shower doors. These doors do not run all the way to the floor, though.

One of our favorite sites in scotland!

I believe this park has just reopened again after renovations and it is now well kept.

Friendly polite staff on arrival and they are on site 24hr a day. Barrier gets shut at night and you get a code to re enter.

Pitches are well spaced and well kept, we have an 8m Unit and was easy to get in and out. There are also separate caravan pitches and a field for tents with and without electric points.

Plenty of fast food options close by and everything is fast delivery on Deliveroo.

Location couldn't be better really, lots of walks for friendly dogs and a dog park next door for doggo activities.

Lots do for kids as well! They have a clean and safe little park in the middle, one of the best and cleanest we've seen in scottish sites. A 5 minute walk will take you to another council play park. Right next door is "wonder world" a big soft play center and "Air thrill".

There is also a golf course next door with a driving range and a mini golf course for the kids as well!

Right next to the park is a bus stop which will take you into perth city center for the shopping center, swimming, food etc. There is also a Costa 15 minutes away on foot, 2 in the car.

Toilet facilities on site are clean, a little dated but clean and everything there you need. Along with all the bins and motorhome service point, clean and present.

This site is situated next to a dual carrgeway but my young kids (2 & 6), my wife and I slept just fine and we were as close to it as you can get on a weekend.

For the price, location and cleanliness on site its amazing value and a great place to stop.

We will be back 👍

Nice quiet site outside Perth clean and tidy warden Kevin very helpful and friendly
Stayed two nights nice restuarant about 10 mins walk from site co op very handy walking distance nice park area for kids
Would recommend site

Nous avons passé une nuit fin avril 2026, le personnel est très gentil et les locaux (douches/toilettes) sont propres et agréable. Nous n'avons pas rencontré de voisins bruyant ou ennuyant mais nous étions en basse saison donc il n'y avait pas grand monde.
Loved this caravan park.  Staff were friendly and very helpful. Definitely recommend
Great place for a stopover and local to Perth

Nice site, unfortunately there were a lot of travelers using it at the moment,  as the council was using the site to house them, while their permanent site was being renovated. We just didn't feel comfortable.
Perfect place to stay
Very helpful when we had to stop unexpectedly after a breakdown. Were able to give us a pitch without any fuss.
Lovley clean and quiet site
Peace and quiet, everything in place
Awful, if possible do not park here can’t even use the laundry room ffs - been all over Scotland this is unfortunately the worst campsite yet! Not good for dogs or kids.

No rules or regulations in place some travellers on site with there transits in car park two or three cars at vans ,grass needs a bit of attention  and edges of pitches   need cut good job it's only a one nighters I was here

This park is nestled under electrical pilons so not very attractive, and situated in such close proximity to A9 that it's difficult to sleep. The pathways on site are uneven and potted making it difficult to get to pitch or use a water barrel trolley. Very relaxed and limited rules on site, no barrier, no staff except on arrival, and no regard whatsoever for health and safety regulation regarding spacing of units, we saw several 'merged' units and tents on arrival then we came back from a day out to find our new neighbour had pitched an awning that was touching our unit and no staff on site to deal with this intrusion of space and potential fire hazard. Only good thing to say about the site is that the toilet and shower facilities are dated but very clean. Our first and last visit to this site.

Been going for years. This time really disappointing grass not cut, tiny untidy pitch, lots of empty pitches but stuck in between 2 other vans one of which had parked his car on our pitch, he was nt very happy when we asked him to move his car, we had a leak under our sink so used dish washing facilities 1st time using, NEVER AGAIN!!  the smell coming up from sink disgusting, put some scraps in bin  at side of sink obviously had nt been emptied for a while turned my stomach then to top it all travellers moved in, WONT BE BACK !!!

Bra camping som kan vara lite svår att hitta till - enklast via koordinater till GPS:en. Lugnt och tyst.
Jättebra duschutrymmen och tvättstuga finns. Bra pris utan el men högt påslag för att få elanslutning.
Hat guten Hundewald - ist jedoch nicht einfach zu finden - fragen bei Ankunft.
Bon emplacement,calme. Idéal pour une tente
Nice site with good, clean facilities. Warden was lovely and very helpful.
Clean & tidy site and facilities. Good hot showers. Warden was super helpful, 10/10 for customer service.

Season barely started and site almost empty. Stayed here years ago in a tent when it was named Noahs Arc and loved it. Nice and close to Perth for return of rental Campervan in the morning.

Great showers. Friendly helpful warden.

Convenience of A9 main road nearby which can be heard at site.
Although it was on an industrial estate near A9. No noise at all.
Leider dort wo wir einen Platz hatten kein WLAN. Aber sonst gut

I spent a few nights here on a Scotland trip recording a van camping video for my YouTube channel More Than Just a Cleaner.
My friend and I stayed in The Ark, which I affectionately called a shed 😅
Unlike other pods I've stayed in this had beds - 3 to be precise + kettle, microwave, a small fridge/freezer and a TV. Don't expect a lot of floor space. There is an outside area with a picnic bench.
Whilst there are mattresses, you'll need your own bedding.
The toilets and showers are good with more showers than I expected.
There's a laundry and pot washing area and several drinking water stand pipes.
You can hear the M90 in the background but it's not overbearing at all.
I accidentally left a camera attached to a lamp post which I only realised several hours after leaving when I got home. A quick call and the owners have retrieved the camera and we've come to an arrangement for it to be returned 👍😁
I haven't got any pictures, only video, which will appear in a future YouTube upload.
I am the girl who called earlier to take a shower with my friend. Thank you again for your kindness ! I really appreciated it ! Wish you all the best !
Très propre ,calme
We like , Staff very welcoming and friendly!!  The only problem is motorway noise.  Other than that, would recommend.
Decent stop on way to highlands. Location is slightly random, but park is clean with good facilities

One night spent by two adults in a campervan.
The campsite is big and not particularly close to anything. There's more space than toilets and showers and, by far, more people than effort in keeping the facilities clean. The showers are close to disgusting. Among its facilities, this campsite offers a small laundry. But it's very crowded (getting a spot is not easy), expensive and one of the dryers is a complete waste of time and money, as it doesn't work.
Overall this is a campsite full of misbehaved families that keep being really noisy all day and night. On top of that, the highway is so close that the constant sound of cars makes sleeping even less pleasant.
Although the people at reception were nice, this was the worst campsite we found in a two week trip across Scotland. This is not a place for those who want to rest peacefully.
Fab wee place 🙂👍🏻
Die Autobahn hört man recht gut wc hätten eine renovation nötig.

Very nice and clean place to stay. On a camping unit can be easily set a car (van) and a tent if you need  one beside. Drinking water is placed all around, there is a nice playground for children as well. I missed some storage facility for various equipment,
Out of date toilet and shower unit.

Le camping est familial avec des emplacements libres en nombre limité au calme. Sanitaires très propres. ||A côté, il y a un practice de golf avec un magasin.||Nous avons été accueilli par le fils qui voulait savoir notre index au golf. ||Nous avons garé le camping car, branché l'électricité, et hop, pour 10 livres, nous avons fait un seau de balles avec mesure de chaque coup joué. ||Une halte parfaite sur la route d'Inverness.

Nice open space, lovely clean toilets and showers. Laundrette takes £1 and 20p coins only, costs around £3 per wash and £1 an hour for the drier. Lots of drinking water taps around. Nice playpark for younger kids, my teens made use of the big grassy spaces for football. Nice walks round the park if you have a dog. Lovely looking new wooden cabins. The warden was lovely when we arrived and gave us a better pitch as we had a breakdown en route and ended up with a smaller vehicle. Very nice of her
Amazing site...really helpful staff

Guter Campingplatz, ist gepflegt, Dusche, WC sauber. Alles was man braucht vorhanden (Frischwasser, Wifi, Waschmaschine, Tumbler, Strom....)
15 min mit Velo bis zum Städtchen.

This is a lovely caravan/camping site with plenty of amenities available. Toilets and showers were lovely and well maintained. This is our first return in 8yrs and it was just as good then as it was recently. The reception staff was lovely and very helpful when we realised our electric hookup wouldn’t stretch to the main socket, even moved us to another spot. It’s a great place for kids as there is plenty to with crazy golf and soft play within walking distance  and a dog play area (which needs to be booked). But we are definitely returning here and bringing more family with us
Für 1 Nacht okay, mussten am nächsten Morgen den Camper in Edinburgh abgeben. Anlage sehr veraltet, man hört die angrenzende Autobahn sehr gut.
Very friendly and excellent facilities
Spotlessly clean and tidy. Great site. We will be back. Lovely watching the wild rabbits
Lovely campsite, very clean and tidy and good transport links for visiting the town.
